securityGroupEgress.description: Allow all outbound traffic by default

userData.Fn::Base64:
#!/bin/bash
export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
apt-get update -qq
apt-get install -y -qq ruby wget python3 python3-pip python3-venv iproute2 curl
wget -q https://aws-codedeploy-us-east-1.s3.amazonaws.com/latest/install
chmod +x ./install
./install auto
systemctl enable codedeploy-agent
systemctl start codedeploy-agent
mkdir -p /var/www/my-app/hotfix

source.buildSpec:
version: 0.2
phases:
  build:
    commands:
      - echo Build started
artifacts:
  files:
    - appspec.yml
    - scripts/**/*
    - app/**/*
    - hotfix/**/*
